reviews.title: Love It
reviews.text: This is the best Bluetooth speaker made in history had for 5 years!!! Love has traveled with me everywhere…

reviews.text: Pretty good sound, not the best but good for the price and portability.

reviews.title: Love it

reviews.title: Amazon Tap
reviews.text: I love my Tap better than the Full size Echo plus. The tap has better sound, can be carried to pool and can Bluetooth to my MP3 player!
reviews.author: Nikki

reviews.title: Good sound quality, love the bluetooth
reviews.text: Perfect for my office. Combined with Prime, you've got music to last the week without hearing anything repeated. Bluetooth lets you take it outside if you've got good signals.

reviews.title: This is a great speaker

reviews.text: I use this when I"m cooking outside, so great to have a speaker that doesn't tie up my phone. It's also great to have a timer available.

reviews.title: Hands Free Is For Me
reviews.text: This is one of the best pieces of technology I have purchased. I could make phone calls come a plane music, turn lights on and off, etc. No limitations with this baby.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The item is working as described and am happy with the quality and performance.

reviews.text: Speakers chips when sitting on charging base for more than a day.

reviews.title: Been happy
reviews.text: Sound and reception are great, the only downside of this is the capabilities that the other products have, like the hub to control devices, lights and make calls.

reviews.title: Great for teens

reviews.title: Great product

reviews.title: Great product

reviews.title: Nice gadget

reviews.title: Great Speaker

reviews.title: great machine
reviews.text: works just like any alexa machine but entirely portable
reviews.author: hemi

reviews.title: Sound is Great
reviews.text: First time I listened to a Tap at my friends house it sounded better than the Echo!
reviews.author: EchoFan

reviews.title: Love it! Take it everywhere.
reviews.text: I have all of the Alexa products including this tap, dots, echos and fire tv - love them all! Wish I had adapted to them earlier. We take the Tap with us everywhere including our backyard to our RV.
reviews.author: MarkT

reviews.title: One of a kind
reviews.text: There may be speakers that sound better or there may be bluetooth speakers that have better battery life. But, there are none that combine great sound, decent battery life (have used them for a full day on battery), AND throw in Alexa voice control in one package (until maybe Sonos) It's nice to be working in the yard and tell Alexa to play something or pause something, especially if your hands are dirty. But it's AWESOME to tell that same speaker "Alexa, turn on the yard lights"...... I bought one for each of my daughters as gifts!
reviews.author: PapaC

reviews.title: Just Awesome
reviews.text: The Tap is a great addition to our household. The portability feature is great.
reviews.author: memmd

reviews.title: Great low price sound
reviews.text: It has fantastic 360 sound for being a smaller sized compact speaker. It is so cool to just tap it to ask it to play the old rock song that in the mood for!!!
reviews.author: Texas

reviews.title: Great smart home device
reviews.text: Great device speaker is very loud but battery dies quickly. Certain things this model can not do but does just enough for me and my family.
reviews.author: Jlax16

reviews.title: didn’t like that it wasn’t hands free
reviews.text: I liked that product because it produced a lot of sound for its size but didn’t like that you had to press a button to interact with it
reviews.author: Tink

reviews.title: Portable Speaker
reviews.text: I bought this because it was on sale for $89. I like that it is portable but it you are in the area of an unknown wireless connection you need to set it up through your Alexa app before the speaker will work. Also, the speaker periodically will chime when no key was said.
reviews.author: In4dfun2

reviews.title: Portable
reviews.text: I wanted a portable speaker that worked with Amazon prime music. There is nothing in the market right now that does that except for the Tap. For the $100 price its fine. I would rather spend $200 and get a better sound quality speaker though since it will be used outside as well as is in the kitchen.
reviews.author: Lane

reviews.title: Nice!
reviews.text: Loud enough for small gatherings & very responsive to commands.
reviews.author: jxpaulina

reviews.title: It's Ok
reviews.text: Not too satisfied with the sound and it loses Bluetooth connection no matter what phone I use (either Iphone or Android).
reviews.author: SHADOW23STALKER

reviews.title: Too difficult to figure out
reviews.text: I spent more time trying get it functioning than I did actually keeping this product. After a couple of days and never getting it to understand or follow my commands I returned it to BB. Also it kept trying to sell me products which I really didn’t appreciate.
reviews.author: Jack

reviews.title: Perfect speaker for house
reviews.text: Great speaker for around the house listening to music and asking questions

reviews.title: Hands-free
reviews.text: My Echo hasn't updated to the latest version that allows for hands-free operation. I'm not sure what the problem is.

No Amazon has updated the software to where it will respond to voice commands so not problems with it at all . You need to keep it on the charge stand if you are going to use voice commands.

reviews.text: Initially purchased product we didn't need or want and returned to store and obtained this product. It is perfect for our needs--portable and great sound quality. Very pleased with it.
reviews.author: Sassy21

reviews.title: Alexa, Lets go for a ride?
reviews.text: The Echo Tap is a great way to take Alexa voice service around as you travel, with the added benefit of a bluetooth speaker. A software update now allows hands free mode, so it makes it more versatile. Got this on sale at BBY along with an Echo Dot.
reviews.author: Buy411

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text:
Hears commands easily. Even my son with delayed speech can command the tap.
Battery lasts ages.
The only downside is you can't call from her.

Good item, lots of fun. There are better models but they also cost more.

reviews.title: love it!!
reviews.text: I love my Echo Tap! After using this for a while I went out and bought 2 dots. Works well
reviews.author: chef8432

reviews.title: Very satisfied with this product.
reviews.text: I am very happy with the Amazon Tap. I especially like the hands free part of the product so I do not have to "tap" the speaker to respond to commands. Can play my stations I have already set up with Pandora. Sound quality is great and I love that you can take the unit out in the garage and get a quality sound without hooking up to a power supply.
reviews.author: TimJ

reviews.title: Echo Tap
reviews.text: I love this item because it is portable and I can still carry all of my Amazon Music wherever I go.

reviews.title: Great buy
reviews.text: Best Alexa device! It has all the functionality of the other devices and it’s also wireless.
reviews.author: Bigred84

reviews.title: Tap leveled up!
reviews.text: The reason I finally got a Tap is because Amazon has finally enabled it to have "always listening" on. No longer does it need to have a button pressed in order to give a command or question. The sound is great on the speaker.
reviews.author: wagostini

reviews.title: Maybe good if on move alot
reviews.text: Tried one out at Christmas, but decided to return it for the 2nd gen echo. Best Buy great with exchange. Best Buy has a speaker you can make a dot portable with that works great to make portable. Tap might be nice to wet feet with for first unit.

reviews.title: Nice feature to keep home secure.
reviews.text: I have not activated the Amazon Tap speaker but have reviewed the instructions. It appears that it will take a minimal amount of tech skills for anyone to get it running.

reviews.title: Fun gadget for the home
reviews.text: Capable if running a lot of things from a voice command. Looking forward to learning all the features. Could have better set up instructions.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: Bought as a gift for my mom for Christmas she loves it the volume exceeds expectation.

The Amazon Tap has excellent sound qualities for such a small unit.
Love the portability of the device.

reviews.title: Love My Echo Tap
reviews.text: Love my Echo Tap! It's portable and allows me to take anywhere within the house or outside by the pool. The sound quality is great!!

reviews.title: Love Alexa! Much easier than “Googling.”
reviews.text: The Echo is great! We love asking for weather conditions, to have lights turned on and off, playing music from Spotify, and for trivial info!

reviews.title: Love it !
reviews.text: It replaces my echo. This one you can take anywhere and is rechargeable.

reviews.title: works like echo, but portal with battery
reviews.text: So that I can move this speaker around without need of power outlet.
reviews.author: Q1989X64

reviews.title: Best Alexa!
reviews.text: It's much better than expected. It's an Echo with built-in battery you can take anywhere (wish it was water resistant/proof). Sounds very good, has good battery life and once you upgrade to latest software you can enable feature so you don't need to keep pressing button to talk to Alex!
reviews.author: EdFullerton

reviews.title: was a gift for a teenager and he was very pleased
reviews.text: I was at a loss for a gift for my grandson who is 18. When the salesperson at Best Buy showed me this item and told me what all it could do, this sounded like the perfect gift. I was well pleased.

reviews.title: Convenient wireless speaker
reviews.text: This is a very convenient wireless speaker that is even easier to use with Alexa. Set up is a little tricky though.
reviews.author: Clayfish

reviews.title: My son loves it
reviews.text: Got this for my 21 yr old son. He loves it. It’s smaller than what I expected. Just wish I could drop-in on him using this.
reviews.author: MJR2018

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Love the Alexa Tap because of the quality and the portability
reviews.author: Louis

reviews.title: Cool gadget
reviews.text: We are still learning how to use this. But so far we have had a lot of fun with it. It definitely is helpful as far as reminding us of what and when we have things to do. The alarm feature is pretty awesome too!
reviews.author: KimmyL

reviews.title: Great Sound Quality
reviews.text: The sounds quality of this is fantastic, which is one of the reasons for the purchase. Was looking for a wireless speaker and get the Alexa features as a bonus!
reviews.author: RJSEGN

reviews.title: A box of fun!
reviews.text: The whole family is enjoying this purchase! Granddaughter likes to hear jokes, Grandpa is all about the News flash, we've played Jeopardy and checked the weather. The alarm feature is worth the money in itself. We were set up in minutes and purchased the light bulb that Alexa can turn on and off just for fun!
reviews.author: Evenstar7

reviews.title: Great sound and function
reviews.text: This is a great portable speaker and the Alexa features make it a lot of fun to play with and use.
reviews.author: Divemasterdrew

reviews.title: great portable Alexa device
reviews.text: This battery operated Alexa speaker has good sound although not quite as good as the Echo 2nd Gen. Also with a software upgrade has a hands-free feature.

reviews.title: Cool speaker
reviews.text: It has both smart features and a speaker.Smart speakers are good but this is one of its kind that’s portable others have to be connected to an port to work
